app.title: BorrowWise
app.subtitle: Understand a loan before you accept it.

onboarding.consentTitle: Read your loans, on your phone
onboarding.consentBody: BorrowWise reads MoKash and Wewole loan messages on this device to show you what each loan really costs and warn you before you owe too much. Nothing is sent anywhere without your say-so.

loan.repaymentsHint: What you've paid, and the balance after each.
loan.thinkTwiceBody: This offer is high-cost and comes from a lender not on UMRA's licensed register.

Stable.headline: You're on stable ground
Stable.nudge: Your repayments look manageable. Keep borrowing only what you can comfortably repay.

Emerging Risk.headline: Signs of emerging risk
Emerging Risk.nudge: Your obligations are climbing. Consider pausing new loans until your current ones are cleared.

High Risk.headline: High risk of over-indebtedness
High Risk.nudge: Taking on this loan could push you past what you can repay. Talk to your lender about restructuring before borrowing more.

settings.title: Settings
settings.appLockDesc: Require fingerprint or PIN to open the app

tc.lede: About to accept a loan app? Paste its terms & conditions and I'll flag anything dangerous in plain language.
tc.placeholder: Paste the loan app's terms here…
tc.stubNote: Demo review. The full version reads the app's own terms and analyses them with AI.

chat.greeting: Hi — I'm Sente. Ask me anything about your loans or money, no judgment. How can I help?
chat.rescueOpener: I stopped you before {{app}}. What do you need the money for? No judgment — let's find a safer way. 🤝

safer.header: Need money fast? We get it.
safer.sub: The pressure is real — but a high-cost 2-week loan can dig a deeper hole. Safer ways first:

licensed.d: Regulated by UMRA/BoU with capped rates.

sacco.d: Members' rates, flexible, and no harassment.

less.d: UGX 100k for 7 days costs far less than 200k for 30.

wait.t: Wait a few days if you can
wait.d: Even 3 days may bring salary or a cheaper option.

understand.headline: You borrowed {{amount}}. You'll repay {{repay}} — that's {{extra}} extra over {{days}} days.
understand.perDay: That's about {{perDay}} a day you're paying to hold this money.
understand.late: Miss the due date and penalties can add up fast — often more than the interest itself.
understand.early: Repay early and you keep more — there's no reward for waiting.
understand.coach: You're not bad with money — knowing the true cost is what keeps you in control. 👏

f.repaid: Loans repaid on time so far

score.privacy: This score is yours. It's built on your device from your Mobile Money history — lenders don't see it unless you choose to share.

safe.incomeSub: what comes in and stays, averaged over 3 months
safe.canBorrow: You can comfortably borrow up to
safe.at: over ~30 days, at a fair rate under {{pct}}%
safe.lay: In plain terms: this keeps repayments under a third of your income — so you can still cover food, rent and airtime. Borrow more and you risk falling behind.

danger.title: Wait — {{app}} could trap you
danger.f1: High daily interest that stacks up fast
danger.f2: Hidden fees, shown after you accept
danger.f3: Wants your contacts — used to shame you
danger.understandSub: Talk to Sente — find a safer loan

contrib.countSub: borrowers protected others this month — you're one of them
contrib.sentSub: Nothing leaves your phone unless you tap. You're in control.
contrib.share1: Counts only — e.g. "12 flags on Ezee Credit, Kampala"
contrib.share2: Exposure by district — no names, no messages, no loans
contrib.share3: Pooled with thousands → Bank of Uganda & UMRA
contrib.privacy: Your identity, your SMS and your loans never leave the phone — only anonymous, aggregated numbers do.
